name: Cherry Brownies
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 sticks (6 ounces) unsalted butter, melted and cooled slightly
1 cup chopped sweet cherries with juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F (150°C).
2. In a large bowl, whisk together the flour and salt.
3. In a heavy-bottomed saucepan, melt chocolate and butter over low heat, stirring often until smooth.
4. In another bowl, lightly beat eggs with milk and vanilla extract.
5. Add the egg mixture to the chocolate-butter mixture, then pour into the dry ingredients.
6. Stir in the walnuts, cherries (with juice), and any remaining cherry juice until combined.
7. Pour the batter into a greased 9-inch square baking pan.
8. Bake for about 1 hour and 5 minutes, or until set.
9. Cool on a rack, then cut into squares and serve plain or with vanilla ice cream or lightly sweetened whipped cream.
